Create, update, and delete message templates
Lists all message templates for a WhatsApp Business Account.

response.name: Templates retrieved

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new message template for a WhatsApp Business Account. Templates must be approved by Meta before they can be used to send messages.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Deletes a message template. Deleting by name removes all language variants. Pass hsm_id to delete a specific language version.

query.description: Specific template ID to delete a single language variant

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates an existing message template. Only APPROVED or PAUSED templates can be edited. Edits re-trigger the approval process.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
List and manage phone numbers on a WABA
Lists all phone numbers associated with a WhatsApp Business Account.

response.name: Phone numbers retrieved

Manage webhook subscriptions for a WABA

Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The WhatsApp Business Management API enables programmatic management of WhatsApp Business Accounts, phone numbers, message templates, analytics, user assignments, product catalogs, and webhook subscriptions through the Meta Graph API.
